title: Restore original logo in Layout header

requirements.text: Restore the logo in the Layout component (frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx) to its original appearance as it was before Version 16. Inspect the current logo markup and revert any unintended changes to the logo image source, size, styling, or text that were introduced during the recent deployment.

quotes: everything is ok but logo changed

acceptanceCriteria: The logo displayed in the sticky header matches the original logo design prior to Version 16 changes.
No other header or navigation elements are affected by the fix.
The logo renders correctly on both desktop and mobile layouts.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not alter any functionality introduced in Version 16 (Add Buffalo/Cattle and Add Customer fixes).
nonGoals: Redesigning or updating the logo to a new style.
Modifications to navigation links or other Layout sections.
